UserProgress.title: UserProgress
UserProgress.description: Represents the serialized lesson codes, progress, covered topics, and notes for a user.

codes.description: Keys are exercise IDs, values are the modified code strings.

progress.description: Keys are exercise IDs, values are booleans indicating if solved.

completedTopics.description: Keys are roadmap topic IDs, values are booleans.

notes.description: Keys are exercise IDs, values are the written notebook entries.

updatedAt.description: The last time this progress was synced.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user-individual progress states, notes and code answers.
